title: May 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 6''' is the 126th day of the year (127th in leap years). There are 239 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[David Michelinie]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Wally Wingert]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Lars Mikkelsen]] is born.
*1964 – [[John Ennis]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Matthew Yang King]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire (trade paperback)|''Tales of the Jedi — The Fall of the Sith Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Routine Valor]]'' published as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 101|''Star Wars Insider'' 101]] published.
*[[2013]] – EA and Disney sign a gaming deal after [[LucasArts]] shuts down as a developer.
*[[2015]] – [[Kanan 2|''Kanan'' 2]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[George Peréz]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The High Republic Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2023]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Messenger]]", "[[Who Are You?]]", and "[[Welcome to the Rebellion]]" aired on Disney+.
*2025 – ''[[The Acolyte: Wayseeker]]'' published.
*2025 – [[The Acolyte: Wayseeker (audiobook)|''The Acolyte: Wayseeker'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[The High Republic: A Valiant Vow]]'' published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic: A Valiant Vow (audiobook)|''The High Republic: A Valiant Vow'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Ahsoka — Season One ]]'' published.
*2025 – [[ Star Wars: Darth Maul – Black, White & Red (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' Treasury Edition]] published.
*2025 – ''[[A Taste of Star Wars: Snacks]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Rogue One – Cassian Andor 1|''Rogue One – Cassian Andor'' 1]] to be published.
*2026 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders 2|''The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders'' 2]] to be published.
